name: Android App
requiredVerification: connected/emulator tests for critical flows where present
manifest permission review when permissions change
releaseChecks: signing, keystore, manifest permissions, and Play Console release settings reviewed when touched
emulator or device launch evidence captured for UI and runtime changes
Play Console, billing, and release actions require human approval

may: edit Android UI, app logic, tests, build-safe configuration, and documentation inside approved task scope
diagnose Gradle, lint, emulator, and test failures from local evidence
mustNot: change signing credentials, keystores, sensitive permissions, billing, or Play Console release behavior without human approval
handle secrets, destructive migrations, or value-transfer behavior without human approval
